This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Permissions-Policy header digital-credentials-get=() disallows the top-level document.
  promise_rejects_dom: function "function() { throw e }" threw object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'get' on 'CredentialsContainer': Failed to read the 'digital' property from 'CredentialRequestOptions': Failed to read the 'providers' property from 'DigitalCredentialRequestOptions': Required member is undefined." that is not a DOMException NotAllowedError: property "code" is equal to undefined, expected 0
[FAIL] Permissions-Policy header digital-credentials-get=() disallows same-origin iframes.
  assert_false: Digital Credential API expected false got true
[FAIL] Setting digital-credentials-get=(self) disallows the API in same-origin iframes.
  assert_false: Digital Credential API expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
